name: Freddy Martin
description: American band leader and tenor saxophonist (1906–1983)
abstract: Frederick Alfred Martin (December 9, 1906 – September 30, 1983) was an American bandleader and tenor saxophonist.

about_quotes.speaker: Hal Espinosa
about_quotes.evidence: And I worked with Freddy Martin, another old time band leader.
about_quotes.doc_title: Hal Espinosa interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, March 20, 2024

about_quotes.speaker: Nancy Wilson
about_quotes.evidence: And they had the Freddy Martin band... I did more work with those house bands than I did any other time.
about_quotes.doc_title: Nancy Wilson interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, November 16, 1995

about_quotes.speaker: Nancy Wilson
about_quotes.evidence: Freddy Martin. I’m pretty sure that’s – yeah, Freddy Martin’s orchestra.
about_quotes.doc_title: Nancy Wilson — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
